positive: A whimsical, abstract scene depicting a glowing celestial fox spirit amid floating geometric shapes and nebula dust. The fox should have sharp, defined outlines and an elegant silhouette. The composition is highly stylized, featuring deep indigo, vibrant teal, and luminous gold accents against a muted, space-grey background. Style: Japanese minimalist ukiyo-e mixed with psychedelic cosmic vaporwave art. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting on the fox and the geometric structures, giving them a neon glow effect. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, suitable for a t-shirt print. High contrast, clean vectors, perfect lines.
negative: blur, low resolution, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, photorealistic, dirty, noise
